Module 0: Getting Started 0.07 | Ethical and Professional Standards Overview

Ethical and Professional Standards addresses ideas and concepts which underscore the importance of ethical behavior in the investment industry. Areas of focus include ethics and trust in the investment industry, the CFA Institute Code of Ethics and Standards of Professional Conduct and Standards of Practice Handbook, guidance for adherence to the Standards, Global Investment Performance Standards (GIPS) and ethics application. 

Important Note

The CFA Exam includes ethics questions testing Standards I-VII from the Standards of Practice Handbook (SOPH), which is reprinted as part of the CFA Program ethics Curriculum. Although the 12th edition is the current version of the SOPH, the 2026 Curriculum still contains the previous version (the 11th edition).

The Standards are the same in the 11th and 12th editions of the SOPH; however, the SOPH content associated with each Standard -- specifically, the sections titled Guidance, Recommended Procedures for Compliance (which is called Compliance Practices in the 12th edition), and Application of the Standard -- has been updated between the 11th and 12th editions. 

As the SOPH content associated with each Standard is tested on the exam, Candidates are advised to base their study on the published Curriculum for the Exam they have registered for. This means Candidates registered for a calendar 2026 Exam should study the ethics Curriculum they were provided, NOT the 12th edition of the SOPH.

 

Learning Modules and Lessons

Ethics and Trust in the Investment Profession

Lesson 1: Ethics

Lesson 2: Ethics and Professionalism

Lesson 3: Challenges to Ethical Conduct

Lesson 4: Ethical vs. Legal Standards

Lesson 5: Ethical Decision-Making Frameworks

Lesson 6: Conclusion

Code of Ethics and Standards of Professional Conduct

Lesson 1: Preface

Lesson 2: Ethics and the Investment Industry

Lesson 3: CFA Institute Code of Ethics and Standards of Professional Conduct
